title: Add tests for staged optimization workflow, bundle comparison, and KPI calculations
description:
## Summary
Add test coverage for the staged optimization workflow, candidate assessment bundle, and KPI calculations.

## Deliverables
- Cover protocol execution order and gating behavior.
- Cover bundle shape and comparison behavior.
- Cover generalization-gap and stability calculations.
- Cover dashboard rendering and workflow decision output where applicable.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: expand staged optimization test coverage for workflow protocol gating, bundle comparison invariants, and KPI/generalization metric calculations to lock contract behavior.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented and validated expanded tests: (1) candidate_assessment_runner enforces random_gate sample_size>=200; (2) runner workflow_decision reroutes on malfunction context (information_gap dominance); (3) EvaluationTask detail renders candidate assessment compact summary KPIs/stage evidence from task.metadata.candidate_assessment_compact_summary. Validation runs: pytest -q plexus/cli/shared/candidate_assessment_runner_test.py plexus/cli/shared/candidate_assessment_bundle_test.py plexus/cli/shared/generalization_metrics_test.py plexus/cli/shared/workflow_decision_synthesis_test.py (15 passed); npm --prefix dashboard test -- EvaluationTask.memo.test.tsx --runInBand (3 passed).
